THE 2026 LICC IS NOW OPEN FOR SUBMISSIONS!

Submit your most creative work by July 21 and receive 20% off your entry fee.

SUBMIT NOW

The London International Creative Competition Winners

We are thrilled to announce that our eminent judging panel has chosen the Best In Category winners of the 2025 Edition of the London International Creative Competition.

Thousands of ingenious submissions from all around the world were submitted to our world-recognized jury members, making the selection process more challenging than ever. The winners have outperformed expectations in every category, bringing both authenticity and uniqueness to the table.

The winners of the Professional and Non-Professional categories will earn €1,500 and €1,000 in cash, respectively, as well as the LICC trophy and the title of “Best in Category.”

Congratulations to all LICC winners!

VIEW 2025 WINNERS
SUBMIT NOW
London International Creative Competition is back for a new, fresh and creative edition!

Our mission is clear: recognising and rewarding the world’s most fresh and progressive creative talents, from all around the world, in different categories – Architecture, Photo/Video, Art, Graphic, Interior, and Product Design.

Talented creatives, designers, photographers, architects, and artists around the world are invited to enter the award, for a chance to take their work global and connect with the brightest design minds in the industry.

ABOUT THE AWARDS
